workflow.name: Convert YouTube transcripts in Google Sheets to X (Twitter) threads with Apify, OpenAI and RapidAPI
workflow.description:
This workflow lets you scrape and convert youtube video transcript to twitter thread using Google sheets, [Apify](https://apify.com?fpr=ve081) and [RapidAPI](https://rapidapi.com)

### Workflow summary
1. Get unprocessed youtube video link from google sheet
2. Use [youtube trascript scraper](https://apify.com/supreme_coder/youtube-transcript-scraper?fpr=ve081&fp_sid=n8n) to extract transcript from youtube video
3. Feed the youtube transcript to OpenAI model with advanced prompt to convert the transcript to twitter friendly posts/thread
4. Post the thread to 𝕏 from your account using your cookies for authentication 
5. Mark the video as Processed so that it won't be processed again 

### Features
- Fast and cheap (mostly free) APIs 
- Advanced prompts to avoid tweets sound like AI converted from youtube
- Customizable AI Model

### Prompt used

**System:**

You are an expert Twitter thread creator. Your task is to convert YouTube video transcripts into engaging, viral-worthy Twitter threads. Each tweet must be under 280 characters, punchy, and valuable on its own. Use emojis sparingly for emphasis and include line breaks for readability. Always create a hook tweet, 5-10 insight tweets, and a call-to-action tweet.

**User:**

Convert this YouTube video transcript into a Twitter thread. Make sure it doesn't sound like it is direct conversion from youtube. For example do not make sentences that indicates you are perforing an activity in presense tense. 

Create a thread with:
1. A hook tweet that grabs attention. Show results first with numbers 
2. 5-10 tweets breaking down key insights
3. A final call-to-action tweet

Return as structured JSON with the thread array.

Video Title: {{Title}}


Transcript:
{{Transcript}}

options.systemMessage: You are an expert Twitter thread creator. Your task is to convert YouTube video transcripts into engaging, viral-worthy Twitter threads. Each tweet must be under 280 characters, punchy, and valuable on its own. Use emojis sparingly for emphasis and include line breaks for readability. Always create a hook tweet, 5-10 insight tweets, and a call-to-action tweet.

parameters.content:
## Google sheet template

Prepare your google sheet in this format and configure this node to use that sheet. 

| Video | Processed |
|-------|--------|
| https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=example1 |No|
| https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=example2 | No|
| https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=example3 | No
|

## Setting up credentials

### 𝕏 Cookies
Follow these steps to get the cookies:
- Install [Cookie-Editor](https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/hlkenndednhfkekhgcdicdfddnkalmdm) chrome extension
- Login to your 𝕏 account
- Click on the Cookie-Editor -> Export -> Header string 
- Paste the copied cookies into cookie input field 

### RapidAPI Key
- Sign up to [RapidAPI](https://rapidapi.com)
- [Click here](https://rapidapi.com/heycuriouscoder/api/x-twitter-api2/playground/apiendpoint_1a09d2c4-6c90-4bec-98ca-7f325dd3c732) to get api key, Copy from input field **X-RapidAPI-Key**

### Apify API Token
- Signup to [Apify](https://apify.com?fpr=ve081&fp_sid=n8n)
- [Click here]() to get api token (Under section **Personal API tokens**)

## Scrape youtube transcripts
This node uses [apify youtube transcript scraper](https://apify.com/supreme_coder/youtube-transcript-scraper?fpr=ve081) which is the cheapest transcript scraper available right now.

You can click on above link to know more about the  apify actor. 

You can view the scraper input, logs and scraped dataset on apify console once this node is executed.

## Create 𝕏 (Twitter) Thread
This node calls [X-API](https://rapidapi.com/heycuriouscoder/api/x-twitter-api2/playground/apiendpoint_1a09d2c4-6c90-4bec-98ca-7f325dd3c732) service on RapidAPI  to post the converted text content to x.com using your cookies.

Subscribe to Basic plan which is free

## Youtube to 𝕏 (Twitter) threads 

This workflow lets you convert youtube video transcript to twitter thread using Google sheets, Apify and RapidAPI 

### Workflow summary
1. Get unprocessed youtube video link from google sheet
2. Use youtube trascript scraper to extract transcript from youtube video
3. Feed the transcript to OpenAI model with advanced prompt to convert the transcript to twitter friendly posts/thread
4. Post the thread to twitter from your account using your cookies for authentication 
5. Mark the video as Processed so that it won't be processed again 

### Features
- Fast and cheap (mostly free) APIs 
- Advanced Prompts to avoid tweets sound like AI converted from youtube
- Customizable AI Model

### Prompt used

**System:**

You are an expert Twitter thread creator. Your task is to convert YouTube video transcripts into engaging, viral-worthy Twitter threads. Each tweet must be under 280 characters, punchy, and valuable on its own. Use emojis sparingly for emphasis and include line breaks for readability. Always create a hook tweet, 5-10 insight tweets, and a call-to-action tweet.

**User:**

Convert this YouTube video transcript into a Twitter thread. Make sure it doesn't sound like it is direct conversion from youtube. For example do not make sentences that indicates you are perforing an activity in presense tense. 

Create a thread with:
1. A hook tweet that grabs attention. Show results first with numbers 
2. 5-10 tweets breaking down key insights
3. A final call-to-action tweet

Return as structured JSON with the thread array.

Video Title: {{Title}}


Transcript:
{{Transcript}}

data.details: The Filter node can be used to filter items based on a condition. If the condition is met, the item will be passed on to the next node. If the condition is not met, the item will be omitted. Conditions can be combined together by AND(meet all conditions), or OR(meet at least one condition).
